name: Wellington International Airport Limited 4.25% SNR BDS 12/05/2023 NZD10000
summary: Wellington International Airport Limited 4.25% SNR BDS 12/05/2023 NZD10000 represents a specific bond issue by Wellington International Airport Limited, maturing on May 12, 2023, with a 4.25% interest rate and denominated in New Zealand Dollars. This bond is a senior debt obligation of the company. Wellington International Airport is located in Wellington, New Zealand.
